title: Travelers
description: A person travelling on the trip — the party the concierge plans for and whom expenses are split across. One row per companion; the organizer is a traveler too.

tripId.description: the trip this traveler is part of

name.description: the traveler's name as shown in the party list

role.description: 'organizer' | 'companion' | 'child' | 'other' — informs pace, budget share, and packing

homeCountry.description: the traveler's home country (nationality hint for visa/currency advisories; free text, e.g. 'Portugal')

email.description: optional contact email for sharing the plan

notes.description: free-text notes about this traveler the host keeps (e.g. 'jet-lags badly, prefers late starts')

createdAt.description: when the traveler was added to the party

trip.description: the trip this traveler belongs to

preferences.description: this traveler's typed preferences (diet, mobility, interests, pace)

expensesPaid.description: expenses this traveler paid for the group

shares.description: this traveler's share of split expenses
